questions.prompt: It's your first morning. You're finally here. You...

answers.label: Need that quiet coffee moment before the world starts
Are already dressed—you were up before your alarm
Are in bed googling 'best breakfast near me' (priorities)
Text the group: 'what's the plan?'

questions.prompt: When you think about your dream destination, you imagine...

answers.label: Ancient streets with layers of history
Pristine nature, far from crowds
A vibrant city with endless options
A luxurious retreat with every amenity

questions.prompt: Someone asks about your travel budget. You think...

answers.label: I'll make it work. Experiences over expense—every time
I'll splurge on what matters and save on what doesn't
I've worked hard. I'm not skimping on comfort
Budget? When I travel, I don't think about budget

questions.prompt: It's 2pm and you're fading. You...

answers.label: Find a café and people-watch for an hour. No rush
Push through—I'll sleep when I'm dead
Coffee, then see what happens
Head back to the hotel for a proper nap

questions.prompt: You see a long line outside a famous restaurant. You...

answers.label: Get in line. It's famous for a reason
Keep walking. Life's too short to wait
Google if there's a reservation hack
Wonder what the locals eat instead

questions.prompt: Your ideal travel companions are...

answers.label: Solo—I love traveling alone
Partner—romantic getaways
Friends—the more the merrier
Family—creating memories together

questions.prompt: What activities make a trip unforgettable?

answers.label: Outdoor adventures (hiking, diving, climbing)
Cultural experiences (museums, history, art)
Food and drink experiences
Nightlife and entertainment
Wellness and relaxation (spa, yoga, beaches)
Shopping and local markets

questions.prompt: Your ideal accommodation is...

answers.label: Boutique hotel with local character
Luxury resort with all amenities
Vacation rental / local apartment
Reliable chain hotel—I know what to expect
Unique stays (treehouses, yurts, boats)

questions.prompt: What climate/environment calls to you most?

answers.label: Tropical beaches and warm sun
Mountain landscapes and fresh air
European cities and mild weather
Desert landscapes and unique terrain
Lush forests and biodiversity

questions.prompt: What emotional need does travel fulfill for you?

answers.label: Escape from routine and stress
Personal growth and transformation
Adventure and excitement
Connection with loved ones
Learning about the world

questions.prompt: After a trip, you most hope to feel...

answers.label: Changed—like I've grown as a person
Rested—fully recharged and renewed
Thrilled—buzzing with stories and memories
Connected—closer to the people I traveled with

questions.prompt: When experiencing a new culture, you prefer to...

answers.label: Fully immerse—stay with locals, learn customs, speak the language
Explore thoughtfully—try local restaurants, visit markets, take walking tours
Curated experiences—private guides, exclusive access, behind-the-scenes
Hit the highlights—I want the best-known spots and experiences

questions.prompt: What does 'luxury' mean to you when traveling?

answers.label: Time and freedom—no schedules, no rush
Unique access—experiences money can't usually buy
Premium comfort—5-star hotels, first-class, the best of everything
Authenticity—genuine local experiences, even if simple

questions.prompt: Which travel moment would be most meaningful to you?

answers.label: A conversation with a local that shifts your perspective
Standing in a place you've dreamed about since childhood
A physical challenge you weren't sure you could complete
A perfect, unhurried meal with the people you love

questions.prompt: How do you feel about meeting new people while traveling?

answers.label: I recharge in solitude—other travelers drain me
Small, meaningful connections are enough—I prefer depth over breadth
I'm flexible—social or solo depending on my mood
I thrive on meeting people—strangers become friends

questions.prompt: When you seek adventure, what pulls you?

answers.label: The frontier — remote places few have seen
The rush — pushing limits, earning the story
Both equally — I want wild places AND intense challenges
Neither — adventure isn't really my thing

questions.prompt: When exploring culture, you're drawn to...

answers.label: Deep history — why people live the way they do
Aesthetic beauty — galleries, architecture, design
Iconic highlights — the must-sees everyone talks about
I'm not that focused on culture

questions.prompt: When you need to recharge, you want...

answers.label: Stillness — meditation, silence, inner quiet
Ocean rhythm — waves, sun, vitamin sea
Settling in — live like a local, no rushing
Structured wellness — programs, routines, guided growth
I don't travel to recharge — I travel for action

questions.prompt: When you splurge on travel, it's for...

answers.label: Prestige — exclusivity, the best-in-class, recognition
Craft — impeccable service, refined quality, seamless comfort
I don't prioritize luxury — value matters more

questions.prompt: If travel could change you, you'd want it to...

answers.label: Help me discover who I am
Give me a fresh start or new chapter
Teach me something deep — a skill, a language, a craft
Help me heal or process something difficult
Let me finally do what I've always dreamed of
I'm not seeking transformation — just enjoyment

questions.prompt: Your ideal travel companions are...

answers.label: Friends or new people — the more the merrier
Family across generations — kids, parents, everyone
Just my partner — intimate and curated
Locals and communities — I want to connect and give back
Myself — solo is how I travel best

restorationSeeker.description: Seeks rest, renewal, and escape from stress

slowTraveler.description: Prefers depth over breadth, slow immersive experiences

adventureChaser.description: Seeks thrills, physical challenges, and new experiences

discoveryDriven.description: Motivated by finding new places and experiences

culinaryExplorer.description: Food and drink are central to travel experience

authenticitySeeker.description: Values local, genuine experiences over tourist traps

socialConnector.description: Travel is about connection with others

culturalExplorer.description: Drawn to history, art, and cultural experiences

historyBuff.description: Fascinated by historical sites and stories

wildernessSeeker.description: Drawn to nature and remote locations

urbanExplorer.description: Loves city energy, architecture, and urban culture

qualityFocused.description: Willing to pay for quality experiences

experienceMaximizer.description: Wants to fit in as many experiences as possible

connectionSeeker.description: Values deep connection with travel partners

inclusivePlanner.description: Plans with everyone's needs in mind

sensoryExplorer.description: Engages all senses in travel experiences

uniquenessSeeker.description: Drawn to unusual and unique experiences

localLiving.description: Wants to live like a local

escapeSeeker.description: Travel as escape from daily life

decompressor.description: Needs travel to decompress and reset

meaningSeeker.description: Looks for meaning and purpose in travel

curiousTraveler.description: Driven by curiosity about the world
